release_notes: Cash Rounding to nearest KSh 5 (Cash only by default): CashRoundingService, Settings → Cash Rounding, POS Original/Rounding/Amount Due + badge, mixed tender cash-portion rounding, receipts, reports (Original/Rounding/Final + Actual Cash Received), cash_rounding_adjustments ledger, void reverse. Preserves Payment Variance 2.3.52 and Internal Consumption 2.3.51. No Setup/GitHub Release publish.
